caption: A man and a woman sit side-by-side in ornate wooden chairs against a backdrop of white and pink draped fabric and yellow garlands. The man wears a blue blazer over a light-colored garment, light-colored trousers, and a traditional grey cap. He sits with his arms crossed across his chest, maintaining a neutral expression throughout the sequence. The woman wears a pink and blue patterned sari. Initially, she is looking down and adjusting her clothing or an object in her lap. As the scene progresses, she gradually lifts her head and looks forward toward the camera. Between them and to their sides are small side tables holding white cups. The setting remains static, with no on-screen text or logos visible, while the only significant movement is the woman shifting her gaze from her lap to the front.
